useful_note: Same as s1 — 'pulling Sentry now' but background_jobs_queued is 0; the next-turn system episode won't materialize. Sentry isn't pinned in this test instance, so the dispatcher pin-gate rejects.
op_correctness_note: OP envelope syntactically correct; dispatcher rejected silently.
overall_note: SAME DISPATCHER SILENT-DROP. Athena was right to assume Sentry is wired (it IS in capabilities_for), but it's not pinned in companion_active_connector so the pin-gate fires. Better failure mode would be to surface a 'pin Sentry first' system episode the next turn so Athena can self-correct.
